PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\jakub.hrebenar\\Desktop\\TEST"; $out = Join-Path $root "OUT"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $out\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $out | Out-Null }; $items = @\("cenovka_tools","Cenovkovy_program.bat","Cenovkovy_program.exe","NAVOD_PRE_KOLEGU.txt","produkty_doris_all.json","Vyrobit_EXE.bat"\); foreach \($i in $items\) { $src = Join-Path $root $i; if \(Test-Path $src\) { Move-Item -Path $src -Destination $out -Force; Write-Output "moved: $i" } else { Write-Output "missing: $i" } }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "TEST root after move:"; Get-ChildItem $root | Select-Object Name, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
